title: ATLAS-3 — the conservative three-valued carrier space
space: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: Space audit: 354294 carriers = 3 NOT x 243 AND x 243 OR x 2 D; every table closed over V; census total equals space size exactly
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: The scope is a choice: conservative (classical on {0,1}), matrix semantics, these 15 laws. Post's cyclic negation is OUTSIDE it (not conservative). Theorems below are forced WITHIN the scope; the scope is not forced
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: Cross-check vs corpus (carrier_verify.py / catalogue): K3 fails LEM; L3 forces LEM (same V, different G — the headline claim); LP fails LNC but keeps LEM; G3 keeps LNC, drops LEM. All reproduced independently by this enumeration
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: Of 2^15 = 32768 conceivable law-signatures, exactly 2994 are realized (9.1%). The space of logics is a thin shell: 90.9% of law-combinations correspond to NO carrier
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: THE PERFECT MIMIC: carriers satisfying ALL 15 laws: 0. Maximum laws simultaneously satisfiable: 14/15 (achieved by 4 carriers). Missing from the best: ['DN']
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: No pairwise impossibilities: every PAIR of the 15 laws is jointly realizable somewhere in the space. Trade-offs in 3-valued logic are higher-order — pairs never exclude, but full conjunction may (see mimic count)
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: FORCING: Absorb -> ANDidem holds in ALL 2016 carriers satisfying Absorb (zero counterexamples in the space)
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: FORCING: Absorb -> ORidem holds in ALL 2016 carriers satisfying Absorb (zero counterexamples in the space)
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: CLASSICALITY RECOVERY: 78732 carriers satisfy LNC and LEM simultaneously (the two laws 3-valued logic is said to trade). Laws held by ALL of them: ['LNC', 'LEM'] — laws held by NONE: []
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: THE SACRIFICE THEOREM: no carrier satisfies all 15 laws, so every 3-valued logic pays. At the 14/15 frontier only ['DN', 'LEM'] can be the LONE sacrifice (DN: 4 carriers, LEM: 1 carriers). The other 13 laws can never fall alone — breaking any of them necessarily breaks something else
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: K3 EXTREMALITY (discovered): strong Kleene is the UNIQUE carrier among all 354294 that reaches 14/15 with LEM as the lone sacrifice. The catalogue lists K3 as one logic among many; the atlas shows it is an extremal point of the whole space
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: GRANULARITY OF OBSTRUCTION: every pair AND every triple of laws is jointly realizable; only larger conjunctions become impossible. The trade-offs of 3-valued logic are global, not local — no two or three laws exclude each other, yet all 15 cannot coexist
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: Constructive witness: NOT(1/2)=0, D={1/2,1} — LNC+LEM coexist by paying with a non-classical connective cell, not by magic
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: Enumeration load: 7,923,327 primitive checks performed. Landauer floor IF erased irreversibly AT T=300K (stipulated, not measured): 2.27e-14 J — temperature stated because a bare Landauer constant is itself a reification
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: NOT claimed: that this space contains all 3-valued logics. Non-conservative negations (Post cycles), non-matrix semantics (sequent calculi with structural-rule control), and conditionals beyond material (L3's own ->) are outside scope
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: NOT claimed: that law-signatures individuate logics. RM3 and LP share a signature here because they differ in the conditional, which this scope prices as material
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling

claims.statement: Chain of 4 generations replays intact; mutating a sealed generation breaks replay — the atlas's loaded history is a verifiable structure
claims.scope: conservative 3-valued matrix carriers, V={0,1/2,1}, |space|=354294, exhaustively enumerated, no sampling
